subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the Single One, Whom nothing can thwart nor any matter hinder. He doeth whatsoever He willeth through His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الذی لایعجزه شیء و لایمنعه امر یفعل بسلطانه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
